case_title: JAYMEE FAITH SAGISI VS. RACHEL BUERKLE, et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JAYMEE FATIH SAGISIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS RACHEL BUERKLE AND JUSLYN MANALO ARE PRESENT. FARMERS INSURANCE SPECIAL FIELD CLAIMS REPRSENTATIVE PAVEL KUPERSHMIDT IS PRESENT WITH JUSLYN MANALO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED APR-14-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, JUSLYN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAGISI, JAYMEE FAITH AS TO DEFENDANT BUERKLE, RACHEL MANALO, JUSLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED APR-12-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUERKLE, RACHEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAGISI, JAYMEE FAITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUERKLE, RACHEL MANALO, JUSLYN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, LIABILITY FOR PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES IS SHARED 50% FOR EACH DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BUERKLE, RACHEL MANALO, JUSLYN
